Title: UCI Student Math Performance: Study Time and Pass Rate by School (Portugal, 2008)
Source: Cortez P, Silva A (2008). Using Data Mining to Predict Secondary School Student Performance. EUROSIS. UCI ML Repository #320
note: High study time shows higher pass rates in both GP (73.8%) and MS (87.5%) schools, so no Simpson's paradox reversal is expected; the aggregate advantage of high study time is consistent across strata.

treatments.Description: High study time: 3=5-10h or 4=>10h per week
Low study time: 1=<2h or 2=2-5h per week
